have : CreatesColimits solidToCondensed :=
    createsColimitsOfFullyFaithfulOfIso fun {_} _ F ↦
      ⟨by
        -- The internal hom functor `ihom P` preserves colimits because `P` is internally projective.
        -- Therefore the condition `IsSolid` (which is `IsIso (pre (oneMinusShift) A)`) is stable under colimits,
        -- because colimits of isomorphisms are isomorphisms.
        rw [← (preservesColimitIso (ihom (P ℤ)) (F ⋙ solidToCondensed)).isIso_iff]
        exact IsIso.of_iso (HasColimit.isoOfNatIso (NatIso.ofComponents 
          (fun j => asIso ((pre (oneMinusShift ℤ)).app (F.obj j))) (by intros; simp)))⟩
  hasColimits_of_createsColimits solidToCondensed
